mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_management_list (user_list_name, file_path, original_file_name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{params.list.userListName}, #{params.list.filePath}, #{params.list.originalFileName}, #{params.list.description}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO user_management_list (user_list_name, file_path, original_file_name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{params.list.userListName}, #{params.list.filePath}, #{params.list.originalFileName}, #{params.list.description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_management_list SET user_list_name = #{params.list.userListName}, file_path = #{params.list.filePath}, original_file_name = #{params.list.originalFileName}, description = #{params.list.description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{params.listId}

UPDATE user_management_list SET user_list_name = #{params.list.userListName}, file_path = #{params.list.filePath}, original_file_name = #{params.list.originalFileName}, description = #{params.list.description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{params.listId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_list_name, file_path, original_file_name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM user_management_list ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_list_name, file_path, original_file_name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM user_management_list ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_management_list
AND user_list_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.list.userListName}, '%')
AND description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.list.description}, '%')

SELECT id, user_list_name, file_path, original_file_name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM user_management_list
AND user_list_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.list.userListName}, '%')
